generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why some people worry about expanded security powers, but honestly, after what happened in [City], I just want our local agencies to have the tools they need. My neighbor's daughter was targeted by extremists last year - if better coordination had been allowed, maybe it could've been stopped sooner. We can't let perfect be the enemy of good when lives are at stake. #CommunitySafetyFirst
